title: Facility Info, Address, & Contact Information
content:
# Facility Info, Address, & Contact Information

### Facility Info

Triangle Curling Club is a **four-sheet dedicated curling facility** located in the Raleigh-Durham metro area of North Carolina (known as the Triangle), 12 minutes from Raleigh-Durham International Airport (RDU). Triangle Curling is a **501(c)(3)** nonprofit organization and exists to promote the Olympic sport of curling to the residents of North Carolina.

**Bar**: Beer, wine, cider, soda, juice, sports beverages, water, seltzers (NA & alcoholic). Four-tap draft unit.  
**Ice shed**: Concrete base, Marco hacks, filtered+deionized water, speaker system, full Wi-Fi coverage  
**Live Streaming**: Capable of streaming any sheet, audio and video. Streaming: <https://youtube.com/@TriangleCurling/streams>  
**Outdoors**: Grill, bike rack, bench, night lighting, Wi-Fi coverage  
**PA/Presentations**: Wireless mic, speakers, projector+screen, additional presentation screens  
**Parking**: Free, ample, Wi-Fi coverage  
**Restrooms/Changing Rooms**: Men's, Womens. All-Gender changing room also available.  
**Season**: typically Mid-August through Early May  
**Security**: Full exterior and interior CCTV camera coverage, IR night vision, license plate cameras, professionally monitored alarm system  
**Stones**: Kays of Scotland - Common Green w/ Blue Hone inserts (purchased 2019). Red & Yellow handles.  
**Viewing**: Monitors with house views above each sheet. One-row of stadium seating for each sheet.  
**Warm Room**: Approx 2,300 sqft, ample seating, warming kitchen (ovens, microwave, utensils), TV lounge, stretching bar  
**Wi-Fi**: Available for members & guests. SSID and password are posted in the warm room.

### Mailing Address

P.O. Box 14628  
Durham, NC 27709

### Physical Location  

We are located in South Durham, approximately 1 mile west of the Ellis Rd. Exit off of 885/Durham Fwy.  
2310 So-Hi Drive  
Durham, NC 27703  
[Map It](https://maps.app.goo.gl/ASEd2JGhRU4LL1yM7)
